training_status: Started Starting Strength program a few weeks before beginning Sermorelin

benefits.description: Mild improvement in sleep; more vivid dreams, sleeps deeply for a couple of hours but then wakes and has poor sleep again
Has started gaining muscle and losing fat; clothes are looser, though change is only perceptible to herself
Losing some fat alongside muscle gain; no weight loss on scale
Hoping for positive effects on skin in 5 months or so

side_effects.description: Injection before bed causes her to wake up more, making it harder to fall asleep initially

protocol_notes: Takes Sermorelin on empty stomach 15 minutes before bed. Finds timing difficult due to early dinner (~5pm) and early sleepiness (~8-8:30pm). Also taking Tirzepatide. Took Sermorelin primarily for anti-aging properties. 2 weeks and 2 days into protocol at time of post.
